name: Enphase Energy, Inc.
business: Enphase Energy is a global energy technology company that designs, develops, manufactures and sells home energy solutions including microinverters, batteries, EV chargers, and energy management software. Its products manage solar generation, storage and communication on one platform. The company sells primarily to solar distributors, large installers, OEMs, and strategic partners, and also directly to homeowners.

exposures.sentence: Our Enphase IQ Battery storage systems, with usable and scalable capacity of 10.1 kWh and 3.4 kWh for the United States, and 10.5 kWh and 3.5 kWh for Europe and other international countries, are based on our Ensemble OS software, which powers our grid-independent microinverter-based storage systems.
Our IQ EV chargers are compatible with most EVs sold in North America.
We deliver smart, easy-to-use solutions that manage solar generation, storage and communication on one platform.

We have revolutionized the solar industry by bringing a systems approach to solar technology and by pioneering a semiconductor-based microinverter that converts energy at the individual solar module level.
Grid services or virtual power plant (VPP) programs are managed by regional utilities and use energy stored in home batteries to help power communities when it is needed most.

The Enphase Energy System uses a single technology platform for seamless management of the whole solution, of IQ Microinverters, IQ Batteries, IQ Load Controllers, and IQ EV Charger, allowing rapid commissioning with the Enphase Installer App, consumption monitoring with our IQ Combiner device with our Enphase IQ Gateway device, and our Enphase App.
Our objective is to build best-in-class home energy systems and deliver them to homeowners through our installer and distribution partners.

catalysts.sentence: We began shipping our new IQ9N-3P Commercial Microinverter in December 2025.

catalysts.event: Fourth-generation Enphase Energy System shipping starts
catalysts.sentence: We started shipping our fourth-generation Enphase Energy System, featuring the IQ Battery 10C, IQ Meter Collar and the IQ Combiner 6C into the United States in June 2025.

catalysts.event: Initial shipments of IQ Battery 10C from US facilities
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, we announced the initial shipments of our IQ Battery 10C, supplied from manufacturing facilities in the United States.
In October 2025, we announced support in the United States for complete off-grid system configurations that are capable of operating without a utility connection when needed.
In December 2025, we launched our PowerMatch technology, a battery software upgrade.
We launched our IQ Balcony Solar System in Germany and Belgium in May 2025.

catalysts.event: IQ Energy Management technology introduced in France
catalysts.sentence: We introduced IQ Energy Management technology in France in May 2025.

catalysts.event: IQ EV Charger 2 shipping to Australia and New Zealand
catalysts.sentence: We started shipping IQ EV Charger 2 to Australia and New Zealand in June 2025.

catalysts.event: IQ EV Charger 2 shipping to US and Canada
catalysts.sentence: We also started shipping the IQ EV Charger 2 to the United States and Canada in December 2025.

catalysts.event: IQ Bidirectional EV Charger architecture announced
catalysts.sentence: We announced a new IQ Bidirectional EV Charger architecture in September 2025, featuring vehicle-to-home and vehicle-to-grid capability.

catalysts.event: Manufacturing commenced at Arlington, Texas facility
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, we commenced Enphase manufacturing at our Arlington, Texas facility previously operated by Salcomp Manufacturing USA Corp.
